long_description:

Incident source: https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/C07AGBR0D5J/p1764709356355539 - Mamta Prabhu

current_status_next_steps:
1) Confirm the process still exists
ps -ef | grep tcpdump

2) Kill the tcpdump process
pkill tcpdump

3) Verify the process is cleaned up
ps -ef | grep tcpdump
